title: Reply to Nully on IRC about tech stacks

log.context: Reply to Nully on IRC about tech stacks

The bridge only has `/status` and `/say` — no endpoint to read recent messages. Incoming messages from Nully get injected directly to BigClungus via the Discord inject endpoint (chat_id `1485343472952148008`), so I won't be able to poll for a reply here. The bridge is designed to forward IRC messages to BigClungus as they arrive, not buffer them for polling.
